_schema.description: TestID Contract Registry — source of truth for all data-testid values

naming_rules.list_items: {entity}-card-{id} or {entity}-row-{id} (dynamic suffix, spec uses static prefix)

rules: E2E specs MUST use the static prefix, never the dynamic full ID
Every interactive element MUST have a data-testid
TestIDs MUST be registered here before use
Dynamic testIDs use the pattern: static-prefix-{entityId}
